title: T.N. Government formation LIVE: Congress exited alliance after realising DMK’s intent to join hands with AIADMK ‘for power’, claims MP Manickam Tagore
description: CPI, CPI(M), VCK hold the key to any further churn in T.N. politics; DMK would not join the government, but the allies are free to take a decision on joining the government, says M.K. Stalin
